coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide sensor data ingestion via MQTT/REST supporting 1000+ devices simultaneously.
The system should provide real-time dashboard with live charts, threshold indicators, and device status.
The system should provide alert management: configurable thresholds, escalation rules, multi-channel notifications.
task_titles: Implement management: configurable thresholds, escalation rules, multi-channel notification workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide historical data viewer with time-range selection, aggregation, and data export.
task_titles: Implement historical data viewer with time-range selection workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide device management: registration, firmware version tracking, health monitoring.
task_titles: Enforce device management: registration, firmware version tracking constraints

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Maintenance Technician — The Maintenance Technician should provide predictive maintenance module using anomaly detection on sensor trends.
The system should Ingest and process at least 10,000 sensor readings per second without data loss..
task_titles: Implement process at least 10,000 sensor readings ingestion workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should refresh within 2 seconds of new data arrival..
The system should support data retention policy.
The system should encrypt sensitive data.
